hero.title: Turn Leads Into Loyal Customers on Autopilot
hero.subtitle: The all-in-one platform that combines CRM, Automation, Telephony, and Financial Management in one place.

features.1: Centralize all contacts and interactions in a smart CRM
features.2: Automate follow-ups via WhatsApp, Email, SMS, and Voice
features.3: Make calls and send SMS directly from the platform
features.4: Create professional quotes and invoices in minutes

features.title: Everything You Need to Sell More
features.subtitle: Stop using 10 different tools. Bee Pro Hub centralizes everything in one place, saving time and money while multiplying your results.

crm.title: Manage All Your Leads in One Place
crm.description: Never lose a potential customer again! Our CRM automatically captures, organizes, and tracks every lead from first contact to closing the sale.

1.title: Advanced Segmentation
1.desc: Organize leads by tags, status, source, value, and 50+ customizable criteria.

2.title: Complete History
2.desc: See all interactions, calls, emails, and messages with each contact.

3.title: Automatic Scoring
3.desc: AI automatically classifies hot leads so you prioritize those that convert the most.

4.title: Smart Alerts
4.desc: Get notified when leads open emails, click links, or return to your site.

testimonial.quote: We increased our conversion rate by 250% in just 60 days using Bee Pro Hub's CRM to prioritize the right leads.
testimonial.author: Carlos Silva, CEO of TechSales

calendar.title: Synced Calendar That Never Fails
calendar.description: No more scheduling confusion! Let your clients book meetings automatically during your available hours, with automatic reminders that reduce no-shows by 80%.

1.title: Google Calendar Sync
1.desc: Connect with Google Calendar, Outlook, and iCloud. All appointments synced in real-time.

2.title: Automatic Reminders
2.desc: Automatic SMS, Email, and WhatsApp 24h and 1h before. Dramatically reduce no-shows.

3.title: Full Team
3.desc: Manage your entire team's schedules in one place. Automatic round-robin.

calendar.bonus: Custom branded scheduling page + Personalized link to share on social media and WhatsApp.

financial.title: Professional Quotes and Invoices in Minutes
financial.description: Create impeccable business proposals that impress and convert. Ready-made templates, automatic calculations, and one-click sending.

features.1: Professional editable templates with your brand
features.2: Automatic tax, discount, and installment calculations

financial.timeSave: From 2 hours to create a quote manually to just 3 minutes with our automated templates.

automation.title: Marketing on Autopilot
automation.description: Imagine your business selling while you sleep! Our smart automation nurtures leads, sends follow-ups, reactivates inactive customers, and recovers abandoned carts automatically.

1.title: Automatic Email Marketing
1.desc: Welcome sequences, lead nurturing, cart recovery, birthdays, and more.

2.title: Automatic SMS & WhatsApp
2.desc: Instant messages for hot leads, reminders, confirmations, and personalized follow-ups.

3.title: Voice Messages
3.desc: Send personalized voice recordings in bulk. Great for reminders and special offers.

4.title: Push Notifications
4.desc: Direct browser alerts to re-engage visitors who left your site.

testimonial.quote: With Bee Pro Hub automations, our company went from 5 to 50 sales per month without hiring anyone else. The system does the work of 3 salespeople!
testimonial.author: Marina Costa, Owner of Beauty Store

telephony.title: Call and Receive Calls Directly from the Platform
telephony.description: Forget your cell phone! Make and receive professional calls directly from Bee Pro Hub. All calls are recorded, automatically transcribed, and linked to the client's CRM history.

features.1: Make calls with one click from the CRM
features.2: Receive calls with a professional landline number
features.5: Integrated SMS - send texts on the same screen
features.6: Automatic voicemail when you don't answer

telephony.bonus: Get a free landline number + 70 free minutes to test the phone system with no commitment!

beeprocard.title: Your Entire Business in a QR Code
beeprocard.subtitle: No more lost business cards! With BeeProCard, share all your contacts, social media, and portfolio with a simple QR Code or link.
beeprocard.description: Create your personalized mini-site in minutes. Add your photo, logo, description, important links, and even scheduling buttons. Share via QR Code, WhatsApp, or direct link.

1.title: Instant Sharing
1.desc: Generate a QR Code to print or share a link via WhatsApp, Email, Instagram Bio, and more.

2.title: 100% Customizable
2.desc: Your brand colors, logo, photo, description, custom buttons, and much more.

3.title: Collect Reviews
3.desc: Direct button to Google Reviews. Boost your online reputation automatically.

4.title: Track Views
4.desc: See how many people accessed your card, clicked buttons, and saved your contact.

about.title: About Bee Pro Hub
about.subtitle: Transforming businesses through technology and intelligent marketing

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To empower local businesses across the United States with enterprise-level technology that's simple to use, affordable, and delivers real results. We believe every business deserves access to the same powerful tools that large corporations use.

story.title: Our Story
story.text: Born from the expertise of Galaxy IT & Marketing, a company innovating since 2004, Bee Pro Hub was created to solve a common problem: local businesses losing customers due to lack of organization, slow follow-ups, and disconnected tools. We built an all-in-one platform that replaces 10+ separate tools with one unified solution.

1.title: Local Expertise
1.desc: Based in Marlborough, MA, we understand the unique challenges of businesses in Massachusetts and across the US.

2.title: All-in-One Solution
2.desc: CRM, email, SMS, phone, scheduling, invoicing, and automation — all in one platform.

3.title: Bilingual Support
3.desc: Full support in English, Portuguese, and Spanish. We serve diverse communities.

4.title: Proven Results
4.desc: Our clients see an average 300% increase in sales within the first 90 days.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Complete digital marketing and automation solutions for local businesses

crm.title: CRM & Lead Management
crm.description: Centralize all your customer data, track interactions, and never lose a lead. Our smart CRM powered by GoHighLevel gives you the tools to close more deals faster.

automation.title: Marketing Automation
automation.description: Put your marketing on autopilot. From email sequences to SMS campaigns, our automation engine works 24/7 to nurture leads and close sales.

leadgen.title: Lead Generation
leadgen.description: Attract qualified leads with high-converting funnels, landing pages, and targeted ad campaigns. We bring customers to your door.

websites.title: Websites & Funnels
websites.description: Professional websites and conversion-optimized funnels built to turn visitors into paying customers.

ads.title: Ads Management
ads.description: Strategic Google and Facebook ad campaigns that maximize your ROI and bring qualified leads consistently.

1.a: Bee Pro Hub is an all-in-one CRM and marketing automation platform built on GoHighLevel. It combines CRM, email marketing, SMS, phone system, scheduling, invoicing, and automation into a single platform designed for local businesses.

2.q: Do I need technical knowledge to use it?
2.a: Not at all! Bee Pro Hub is designed to be user-friendly. We provide complete setup, training, and 24/7 support in English, Portuguese, and Spanish.

3.a: Yes, absolutely. There are no long-term contracts. You can cancel your subscription at any time with no penalty.

4.q: What makes Bee Pro Hub different from other CRMs?
4.a: Unlike traditional CRMs, Bee Pro Hub is a complete business solution. It replaces 10+ separate tools (CRM, email, SMS, phone, calendar, invoicing, etc.) at a fraction of the cost.

5.q: Do you offer support in languages other than English?
5.a: Yes! We offer full support in English, Portuguese, and Spanish. Our team is bilingual and ready to help you in your preferred language.

6.q: Does Bee Pro Hub work for businesses in the United States?
6.a: Yes. Bee Pro Hub was built specifically for local businesses in the United States, with a focus on Massachusetts. We serve contractors, cleaning companies, roofing, painting, landscaping, and all types of service businesses.

7.q: What is the difference between Bee Pro Hub and GoHighLevel?
7.a: Bee Pro Hub is built ON TOP of GoHighLevel, but includes complete setup, training, dedicated support, and ready-made templates. You get all the power of GoHighLevel without the technical complexity.

8.q: How does Bee Pro Hub help generate more leads?
8.a: Through optimized sales funnels, landing pages, Google Ads, Facebook Ads, email and SMS automation, and automatic follow-ups that respond to leads in seconds — before your competition.

9.q: Does Bee Pro Hub have an integrated phone system?
9.a: Yes. You get a professional landline number, can make and receive calls directly from the platform, with automatic recording, AI transcription, and integrated SMS.

10.q: How long does it take to set up Bee Pro Hub?
10.a: Complete setup is done by our team within 48 hours. You can start using it the same day with the ready-made templates included for free.
